plugin.name: HukoDB_Paste
plugin.author: HukoDB
plugin.purpose: Posts selected text (with colors) to hukodb.com pastebin
plugin.description:
Posts selected text from the output window to the HukoDB pastebin, preserving foreground/background colors, bold, italic, and underline. A shareable link is copied to clipboard.
To use: highlight text and press Ctrl+P
Requires: LuaSocket, LuaSec, json (dkjson or json.lua)

muclient.script:
local RELAY_URL = "https://mm-gear-relay.mm-gear.workers.dev" local MUD_NAME = "MateriaMagica" local has_http, http = pcall(require, "socket.http") local has_ltn12, ltn12 = pcall(require, "ltn12") local has_json, json = pcall(require, "json") if not has_json then local ok, dkjson = pcall(require, "dkjson") if ok then json = dkjson end end -- Try to load ssl.https so socket.http can handle HTTPS pcall(require, "ssl.https") function OnPluginListChanged() end function escapeHtml(s) if not s then return "" end s = s:gsub("&", "&") s = s:gsub("<", "<") s = s:gsub(">", ">") return s end -- Convert a packed RGB number to a hex colour string function rgbToHex(rgb) if type(rgb) ~= "number" then return "#C0C0C0" end local r = math.floor(rgb / 65536) % 256 local g = math.floor(rgb / 256) % 256 local b = rgb % 256 return string.format("#%02X%02X%02X", r, g, b) end -- Convert MUSHclient style runs into HTML with inline styles -- styles: array from GetStyleInfo(line) -- start_col / last_col: selection boundaries (1-based character positions) function stylesToHtml(styles, start_col, last_col) local result = {} local pos = 0 for _, run in ipairs(styles) do local t = run.text or "" local run_len = #t local run_end = pos + run_len if run_end > start_col and pos < last_col then local seg_start = math.max(1, start_col - pos) local seg_end = math.min(run_len, last_col - pos) if seg_start <= seg_end then local visible = t:sub(seg_start, seg_end) local style_parts = {"color:" .. rgbToHex(run.textcolour)} if run.backcolour and run.backcolour ~= 0 then table.insert(style_parts, "background-color:" .. rgbToHex(run.backcolour)) end if run.bold then table.insert(style_parts, "font-weight:bold") end if run.italic then table.insert(style_parts, "font-style:italic") end if run.underline then table.insert(style_parts, "text-decoration:underline") end table.insert(result, '' .. escapeHtml(visible) .. '') end end pos = run_end if pos >= last_col then break end end return table.concat(result) end function CopyScript(name, line, wildcs) local first_line, last_line = GetSelectionStartLine(), math.min(GetSelectionEndLine(), GetLinesInBufferCount()) local first_column, last_column = GetSelectionStartColumn(), GetSelectionEndColumn() if first_line <= 0 then DoCommand("copy") return end if not http or not ltn12 or not json then ColourNote("red", "", "HukoDB_Paste: Missing required Lua modules (socket.http, ltn12, json)") return end local html_parts = {} for line = first_line, last_line do local styles = GetStyleInfo(line) local line_len = GetLineInfo(line).length or 0 if line < last_line then table.insert(html_parts, stylesToHtml(styles, first_column, line_len)) first_column = 1 if GetLineInfo(line, 3) then table.insert(html_parts, "
") end else table.insert(html_parts, stylesToHtml(styles, first_column, last_column - 1)) end end local html = table.concat(html_parts) html = html:gsub("^
", "") if #html == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", "HukoDB_Paste: No text selected.") return end PostText(html) end function PostText(html) local header = '
[' .. escapeHtml(MUD_NAME) .. ']
' local body = json.encode({ content = header .. html }) local resp = {} local ok, status = http.request({ url = RELAY_URL .. "/rest/v1/pastes", method = "POST", headers = { ["Content-Type"] = "application/json", ["Content-Length"] = tostring(#body), ["Prefer"] = "return=representation" }, source = ltn12.source.string(body), sink = ltn12.sink.table(resp) }) if ok and status == 201 then local data = json.decode(table.concat(resp)) if data and type(data) == "table" and data[1] and data[1].id then local link = "https://hukodb.com/paste.html?id=" .. data[1].id SetClipboard(link) ColourNote("CornFlowerBlue", "", "*** Pasted " .. #html .. " chars (with colors) to HukoDB") ColourTell("CornFlowerBlue", "", "*** ") Hyperlink(link, link, "[paste link]", "cornflowerblue", "", true) ColourTell("CornFlowerBlue", "", " has been copied to clipboard.") print("") else ColourNote("red", "", "HukoDB_Paste: Unexpected response from server.") end else local msg = (ok == nil and "HTTP request failed (check internet/LuaSec)") or "HTTP " .. tostring(status or "?") ColourNote("red", "", "HukoDB_Paste: Failed to post. " .. msg) end end -- Set up Ctrl+P accelerator AcceleratorTo("Ctrl+P", "CallPlugin ('a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2', 'CopyScript', '')", sendto.script) ColourNote("CornFlowerBlue", "", "*** HukoDB_Paste loaded. Select text and press Ctrl+P to post.")
